name: Family trees of the Norse gods
description: These are family trees of the Norse gods showing kin relations among gods and other beings in Nordic mythology. Each family tree reflects principally Eddic portrayals of relations, however precise links can vary between sources. Some links are also dependent on two beings being identified as the same by sources or scholars. These family trees, and the relations that comprise them, reflect views from the times and contexts in which the Eddas were produced and recorded and do not likely represent ideas held by all Germanic heathens historically.
